{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322201740539025970B6938F8A9CF\"}"},"total":473},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7167738453545976580","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不过，狗粮也挺好吃的，就是量有点少了，不够饱，希望能多点。甜味的话，不得不说真的很到位。嗯就这样，只能说是一本很不错的书。虽然前期有点无聊吧，但到了中间开始是很不错的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668869286,"group_id":"7094283822916701199","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N//yaxszS/b7p3zEQ4jt+KBAXGPKXVeAuGQy3LlAfIKW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776700848\u0026x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"4442469972841107","user_name":"天不生XX后宫如长夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4442469972841107","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7094283822916701199","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越重生到龙珠世界，成为了孙悟空的弟弟，没有系统，更没有赛亚人之类的血脉，只是一个地球人，可哪有如何，我要走上那无上的巅峰，打破生命束缚的枷锁！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/89a53185cd6f5a56855dbab9f746b14f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440. "10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":58166,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":76816,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9159},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7106097622724707105","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以，稳住，加油更新，只要不崩就是能拿出推的神作。顺便提一点建议吧，有些可以多写一点，比方说之前结婚前夜喝酒的时候，不要怕崩人设，肯定会有人喜欢的，当然也不能崩的太狠就对了。还有就是结婚那段的弹唱，把悟灵的心理活动，其他人的心理活动写一下什么的也好，有点日常也是不错的。最后，我期待十八号强推悟灵[懂了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1654517373,"group_id":"7094283822916701199","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"上士无争，下士好争。上德不德，下德执德。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N72AuPqpLxfKkkIoWRrSyBDfIhSA1/akC0cr6wLBxUpc","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5408c46e423f4be9972e30be7890daa8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706704\u0026x-signature=9%2BHixAIszaJFtBo5nt%2BI03aB30Q%3D","user_id":"1890804490843512","user_name":"珈启"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1890804490843512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1712633108,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\
